message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 60
  BoxPadding 20
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBorderThickness 1
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ParticipantBorderColor #333333
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E9E9F6
  ParticipantFontSize 28
  GroupBorderThickness 3
  GroupBorderColor #000000
  GroupFontSize 28
  MessageFontSize 28
}

participant "张三" as ZS
participant "李四" as LS

alt [借钱案例]
  ZS -> LS : 我要借钱
  loop [循环借钱100次]
    group 成功案例
      LS --> ZS : 借给你
    end
    ZS -> LS : 我要还钱
    LS --> ZS : 收到欠款
  end
else [借钱失败]
  ZS -> LS : 我还要借钱
  LS --> ZS : 不借了
end

@enduml
